creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
this guy probably eats pineapple on his pizza 😡

No, to be serious: 

I’ve just returned from a week in Mallorca, where I stayed in Cala d’or and Alcudia - and I think it was pretty great 🙌

Travelling to Mallorca in the off-season has been two things: 

First, it’s pretty amazing to experience Mallorca without THAT many other tourists. There are still a lot of tourists (and I’m one of them), but it’s on a different level compared to the summer months. 

The weather has changed a lot from day to day, and one day, we had a pretty hefty thunderstorm for 2 hours. And then the sun broke through, it was 25 degrees, and we went to the beach 😅

Have you been to Mallorca or Sardinia? What did you think about (any of) the islands?

#mallorca #sardinia #europetravel
